Client tracker preview for The Breastfeeding Den, LLC

What this is

A preview of a duplicate-ready Notion client tracker organized around the public workflow visible on the site.

Public workflow used

International Board Certified Lactation Consultant (IBCLC), Initial consultation / follow up consultation / prenatal consultation / virtual consultation, Our billing team will file the out of network claim on your behalf, Email support and unlimited short phone calls included with all services

Today ops snapshot Consult + visit board Parent record Intake + insurance view Feeding cadence + weight check view Follow-up + class enrollment view Setup map

Why this shape

From overview to usable workspace

The first screenshots show the main views. The later screenshots show the editable structure that would be delivered: fields, focused tables, individual client pages, and starter records.

What it helps with

  • Every inquiry — contact-form, IntakeQ booking, text, or phone — lands in one row so Katy and LeeAnn aren't re-typing the same intake twice.
  • Out-of-network claim status (CPT S9443 / 99205 / 99404, GAP request, reimbursement confirmation) is tracked per parent so the billing loop stops leaking into email.
  • Follow-up cadence (weight check, pump/flange check, back-to-work prep) is queued on one timeline per parent instead of re-booked one at a time in IntakeQ or Acuity.

1. Today ops snapshot

Today ops snapshot

Everything scheduled today across in-office, in-home, and virtual consults — plus who still owes an intake reply and which out-of-network claims are queued for the billing team.

2. Consult + visit board

Consult + visit board

Every active parent grouped by stage: inquiry, insurance check, consult booked, visit complete, follow-up, out-of-network claim filed, closed — split by consultant (Katy / LeeAnn).

Open this view

3. Parent record

Parent record

One record per parent with intake highlights, consultant, location, insurance status, follow-up cadence, and preferred contact.

Open this view

4. Intake + insurance view

Intake + insurance view

Pulls the contact-form answers, the IntakeQ intake, the visit plan, and the out-of-network CPT packet (S9443 / 99205 / 99404) into one focused screen.

Open this view

5. Feeding cadence + weight check view

Feeding cadence + weight check view

A per-parent timeline from initial consult through weight check, follow-up, pump fit, and back-to-work prep.

6. Follow-up + class enrollment view

Follow-up + class enrollment view

Active follow-up cadence, Private Prenatal Breastfeeding Class enrollments, silent-client flags, referral outbox, and the gift-certificate / pump-rental queue in one place.
